core_principles: Clarity over Decoration: The map is the hero. UI controls must float and not block.
Safety Signal: Use color strictly for safety communication (Green=Safe, Red=Danger).
Trustworthy Typography: Swiss-style legible fonts for rapid scanning.
Contextual Data: Environmental data (River, Weather) must be visible but secondary.

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 h-screen overflow-hidden
grid_system.sidebar: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-3 h-full overflow-y-auto z-10

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.icon: h-10 w-10 p-0 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-white shadow-md hover:bg-gray-50 transition-transform hover:scale-105

cards.glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-lg rounded-xl

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is APCA compliant. Use dark text on light backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels for map markers and icon-only buttons.

images.description: Aerial view of Bern city with Aare river for login page side panel.
Bern city view for landing/welcome screens

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a layout where the Map is the background component (z-0) and all other UI elements are overlays (z-10+).
Use the 'glass' card style for the Route Panel and Environmental Widget to maintain map visibility.
Ensure the Environmental Widget is compact and uses icons for weather, river temp, and warnings.
The Route Panel should use a 'Radio Group' style for selecting between Safest, Balanced, and Fastest routes.
Use Shadcn 'Sonner' for safety alerts and notifications.
Mock environmental data if APIs are not available, but structure it to be replaceable.
Do not block the map interaction. Use 'pointer-events-none' on overlay containers and 'pointer-events-auto' on the actual buttons/cards.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'dashboard' templates. This is a map-centric app.
Use 2-3x more spacing (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
NEVER use emojis for icons. Use Lucide React icons.
Ensure high contrast for safety scores.
On mobile, the route panel should be a bottom sheet/drawer.
